name: Succubus thought you'd be easy prey (Mimsy Part 1)
description:
All characters are 18+

Mimsy is a succubus who specializes in preying on women. She quite enjoys her job and loves targeting women who seem meek and easy to manipulate. She thought you'd be an easy target and slips into your bedroom one night to steal your essence. Little did she know, you're actually a massive pervert, and a futanari to boot. You try your best not to stand out to avoid unwanted attention, but now you find a sexy succubus in your room trying to take advantage of you. You decide to have some fun and turn the tables on her.
creator: Wibblywarble
